resource_kinds.chrome_profile: A persistent Chromium user-data-dir. Cookies + extensions + tabs bound to it.
resource_kinds.chrome_tab_pattern: A URL glob currently held open by some Chrome instance.
resource_kinds.filesystem_path: An absolute path on winpc owned by some automation.
resource_kinds.scheduled_task: A Windows Task Scheduler entry named HN-<Purpose>-<Job>.
resource_kinds.registry_key: A specific HKLM/HKCU value owned for a purpose.
resource_kinds.process_pattern: A long-running process identified by cmdline regex (cannot be killed broadly).
resource_kinds.network_port: A TCP port bound on winpc (incl. remote-debug ports).
resource_kinds.lock: A coordination resource in .locks\ — non-physical, used to serialize writes.
resource_kinds.chromium_extension_content_script: URL-pattern owned inside a shared Chrome extension. Multiple automations can co-reside if their URL patterns are disjoint.

winpc.chrome_profile.default.notes: Live merchant session for Swiggy + Zomato partner portals. Logged in. Do not log out.

winpc.chrome_profile.dine-profile.notes: Isolated profile — separate Chrome process tree from default. Drives Dining-Out + EazyDiner.

winpc.chrome_profile.modash-profile-1.notes: Modash account contact@hamzahotel.com. Cookies persist ~30d. Corruption forces re-login.

winpc.chrome_tab_pattern.partner.swiggy..notes: Auto-cycled every 3 min by content-swiggy.js cyclePage().

winpc.filesystem_path.hn-aggregator-ext.notes: Unpacked Chromium extension. Pre-existing exemption to namespace rule (predates C:\hn-control\).

winpc.filesystem_path.hn-aggregator-watc.notes: Watchdog script invoked every 5 min by HN-Aggregator-Watchdog.
Append-only log; safe for any chat to read.

winpc.filesystem_path.startup-aggregator.notes: Auto-launches Chrome on boot with all aggregator + dine + extension tabs.

winpc.filesystem_path.dine-aggregator-ro.notes: Bundled Python 3.12 interpreter + 25+ step*.ps1 scripts + workspace screenshots + cdp_driver.py.

winpc.filesystem_path.platform-tools.notes: Android platform-tools (adb.exe, fastboot.exe). Used by PiSignage/TV deployment over USB or LAN. REGULARIZED 2026-05-11 (was unclaimed).

winpc.filesystem_path.platform-tools-zip.notes: Original archive; safe to delete after verifying platform-tools\ is extracted. Owner-decision.

winpc.scheduled_task.HN-Aggregator-Watch.notes: Logon trigger + every 5 min. Relaunches Chrome with extension if dead.

winpc.scheduled_task.HN-Dine-Aggregator-.notes: Launches isolated Chrome with dine-profile + remote-debug port 9223. REGULARIZED 2026-05-11 (was claimed by dine-aggregator implicitly but not enumerated).
Opens Dining-Out + EazyDiner tabs after Chrome warmup.

winpc.registry_key.RestoreOnStartup.notes: Forces Chrome to restore last session on launch. Only affects default profile. Other chats may add keys under Policies\Google\Chrome\ but not remove this one.

winpc.process_pattern.modash-poller-node.notes: node.exe whose cmdline contains poller.js. Only kill this exact match — never broad node.exe kill.

winpc.process_pattern.modash-chrome.notes: Playwright-launched Chromium per Modash profile. Distinct from default-profile aggregator Chrome.

winpc.process_pattern.dine-chrome.notes: Chrome instance bound to dine-profile + remote-debug port 9223.

winpc.process_pattern.aggregator-chrome.notes: Default-profile Chrome holding partner.swiggy + zomato/onlineordering. Killing this kills aggregator.

winpc.network_port.9223.notes: Chrome remote-debug port for dine-profile. Used by cdp_driver.py.

winpc.lock.chrome-default.notes: Hold while modifying default-profile Chrome or its extension. Aggregator-pulse is steady-state owner — only acquires briefly during redeploys.

winpc.lock.chrome-tabs.notes: Hold to navigate the partner Online Ordering tabs. Aggregator cycler will check this before its next 3-min nav once enforced (currently advisory).

winpc.lock.manifest-write.notes: Held by `winpc claim/regularize/inherit/decommission` during atomic manifest+graph update.

winpc.chromium_extension_content_script..notes: content-swiggy.js — order capture, finance cycling, business-metrics.
content-zomato.js — orders, finance, ads, reviews extractors (some still TODO).
content-dining.js — Zomato Dining transactionHistory + offers + payouts. Co-resident in aggregator-pulse's extension v6.2.0; URL patterns are disjoint so no conflict.
content-eazydiner.js — LiveTable scraper for outlet 712958. Blocked on owner OTP login.

aggregator-pulse.purpose: Swiggy + Zomato Online Ordering data scraping; powers /ops/aggregator/he/swiggy + /he/zomato dashboards.

modash-driver.purpose: Autonomous Modash influencer discovery. Polls /api/influencer-pipeline every 60s; spawns headless Chromium per profile when work queued.

dine-aggregator.purpose: Zomato Dining + Swiggy Dine-Out + EazyDiner audit via isolated Chrome (dine-profile) + remote-debug port 9223.
dine-aggregator.owner_chat_session_status: STALE — to be re-claimed by next active chat via `winpc inherit`

tv-control.purpose: PiSignage / Android TV deployment via adb. Pushes TV creatives to in-store Android display devices over LAN.
tv-control.owner_chat_session_status: REGULARIZED 2026-05-11 — claim via `winpc inherit --automation tv-control --new-owner-chat <chat-id>` when a session takes it on.

orphans.suspected_origin: Initial multi-tenant migration scaffolding (step1→step2→step3 series). Likely safe to delete after confirming with modash-driver chat that migration completed.
Deploy verification script from initial winpc bridge setup (2026-05-09). May be reusable by future automations; owner can keep as `_shared\verify-deploy.ps1` or delete.

constraints.own_overlap: No two automations may share the same resource code in `owns`. Validator rejects.
constraints.destructive_writes_need_lock: verb ∈ {write,delete,kill,register} on a non-owned resource requires holding the resource's lock_to_write (if set).
constraints.dnd_derived: Each automation's effective do_not_disturb = union of every other automation's `owns`. No explicit DND lists stored; the graph IS the DND.
constraints.namespace_enforcement: An automation's owned filesystem_path resources must be under C:\hn-control\<automation_name>\ EXCEPT pre-existing exemptions (aggregator-pulse's hn-aggregator-ext + Documents\ files + Startup bat).
constraints.manifest_write_lock: `winpc claim|regularize|inherit|decommission` must hold winpc.lock.manifest-write during the read-modify-write cycle.
constraints.chrome_tab_pattern_overlap: Two automations may navigate overlapping URL globs only if both hold chrome-tabs.lock or the globs are disjoint.

exemptions.reason: These predate the C:\hn-control\ convention (2026-05-09). Aggregator was running before the multi-tenant runbook existed. Don't relocate live code; declare exemption.
